LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO TERMS OF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 4, 2013, TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH SF LOCAL RULE 2.6B. The moving party shall provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers by February 11, 2013. Please attach a cover letter confirming the new hearing date.
